rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SAMUEL V. CHONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required on the sole issues of whether this petition should be taken off calendar for failure to address the issues e-mailed to counsel on 01/26/2021 and whether the administrator should be suspended to the extent the failure is attributable to her. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELIZABETH F. COOPER TRUST F/B/O ANN R. MILLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/9/2021. Examiner has only received the petition filed 02/23/2021 and has no other required courtesy copies. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/15/2021. 1) 30 days' notice must be given on the mandatory judicial council form DE-115. Matter continued for proper notice. 2) Whenever an instrument written in a foreign language is attached as an exhibit to a pleading, it must always be accompanied by a copy translated into English. [LRSF 14.15 D.] 3) Please file evidence showing the accounts not listed on schedule a were in existence prior to execution of the trust on 03/30/2018. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/1/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
